heading: Seven Pillars That Support Everything
subtext: Whatever your goals, these foundational habits underpin all of them. No single pillar works alone — they reinforce each other, and improving any one of them tends to lift the others.

pillars.title: Nutrition
pillars.body: Whole foods, adequate protein, healthy fats, fibre, hydration, and micronutrients.

pillars.title: Sleep
pillars.body: 7–9 hours of quality sleep for hormonal balance, memory, and recovery.

pillars.title: Movement
pillars.body: Daily movement, mobility, and time in nature.

pillars.title: Stress Management
pillars.body: Balance challenge with recovery. Build resilience, not just endurance.

pillars.title: Mindfulness
pillars.body: Train attention. Increase awareness, presence, and emotional balance.

pillars.title: Avoid Harm
pillars.body: Reduce toxins, excess alcohol, smoking, chronic stress, and overexertion.

pillars.title: Regular Health Care
pillars.body: Preventive check-ups, screenings, and early intervention when needed.
